scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport] Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=2115552010 3394035076 2747 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XT5000 c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:6144 t=0 0 k=key:64D0957990D9CACE56361094C127B6985DB8C6AB470EFB6DB62033A65A2C9224ABB2AB671D0C6EA8348A1EE59CB13C133997247FBCDD24E005E96FE2005F2A1F05FCD6FCFDF5E7FD2BC8BE6D43C19839193F32CB8 B43E7513BE47A19663428197182DEBBC09C174FD8E8797B4D92DBB4859152786C6CFD7AC0B4E03F3F2358B5 m=audio 3254 RTP/AVP 119 118 117 116 115 114 123 122 120 107 113 112 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:119 G719/48000 a=fmtp:119 CBR=64000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:118 G719/48000 a=fmtp:118 CBR=48000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:117 G719/48000 a=fmtp:117 CBR=32000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:116 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:116 bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:115 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:115 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:114 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:114 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:123 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:123 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=64000 a=rtpmap:122 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:122 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=56000 a=rtpmap:120 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:120 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:107 AAC_LC/32000 a=rtpmap:113 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:113 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:112 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:112 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:o4hwFQGmXPZYwPk1TKCbxak/uUw64rlpvZtwBsot UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:o4hwFQGmXPZYwPk1TKCbxak/uUw64rlpvZtwBsot UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv m=video 3256 RTP/AVP 97 99 96 34 b=TIAS:6144000 a=content:main a=label:11 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=42801f;packetization-mode=0;max-br=10240;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=fmtp:99 profile-level-id=64001f;packetization-mode=1;max-br=10240;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160 a=rtpmap:96 H263-1998/90000 a=fmtp:96 CUSTOM=1024,768,4;CUSTOM=800,600,3;CIF4=1;CUSTOM=704,480,1;CUSTOM=640,480,2;CIF=1;CUSTOM=352,240,1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1 a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000 a=fmtp:34 CIF4=1;CIF=1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1 a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:3m61T4O29d+tTZ+mgutGHrDwXWo8l0z1AAmQcRBb UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:3m61T4O29d+tTZ+mgutGHrDwXWo8l0z1AAmQcRBb UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=sendrecv m=application 3260 RTP/AVP 100 a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:sCQleXdixYGV8DgVu5YXcTo41861qJ7KxWPf67hl UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:sCQleXdixYGV8DgVu5YXcTo41861qJ7KxWPf67hl UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=sendrecv m=application 3236 TCP/BFCP * c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] a=floorctrl:c-s a=confid:1 a=userid:1 a=floorid:2 mstrm:12 a=setup:actpass a=connection:new

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Port: [$3] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq:101 INVITE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=2115552010 3394035076 2747 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XT5000 c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:6144 t=0 0 ACK [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Port: [$3] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
